file.description: Main theme stylesheet with theme header and custom CSS for the Tatame and Light design direction.
Central configuration: off-white background, navy and coral palette, Playfair Display plus DM Sans typography, generous spacing.
Theme setup: load supporting files, add theme supports.
file.content:
<?php
require_once __DIR__ . '/styles.php';
require_once __DIR__ . '/fonts.php';
require_once __DIR__ . '/theme-assets-rewrite.php';

if ( ! function_exists( 'team_haanpaa_setup' ) ) {
	function team_haanpaa_setup() {
		add_theme_support( 'wp-block-styles' );
		add_theme_support( 'editor-styles' );
		add_theme_support( 'responsive-embeds' );
	}
}
add_action( 'after_setup_theme', 'team_haanpaa_setup' );

file.description: Enqueue Google Fonts for both front-end and block editor.
file.content:
<?php
if ( ! function_exists( 'team_haanpaa_fonts' ) ) {
	function team_haanpaa_fonts() {
		wp_enqueue_style(
			'team-haanpaa-fonts',
			'https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:opsz,wght@9..40,400;9..40,500;9..40,700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700;900&display=swap',
			array(),
			null
		);
	}
}
add_action( 'enqueue_block_assets', 'team_haanpaa_fonts' );

file.description: Sticky frosted-glass header with logo, navigation, and coral CTA button.
file.content: Join Now

file.description: Clean footer with navigation columns, contact info, and Telex credit.
file.content:
Team Haanpaa.

Building character, discipline, and community through the art of Brazilian Jiu-jitsu. All ages, all levels welcome.

Academy

  • Programs
  • Instructors
  • Schedule
  • Pricing

Connect

  • Instagram
  • Facebook
  • YouTube
  • Contact

Visit

123 Academy Street
Helsinki, Finland
info@teamhaanpaa.com

2026 Team Haanpaa. All rights reserved.

Created with Telex, powered by WordPress

file.description: Home page: hero cover, programs section, values section, instructors, schedule, and CTA.
file.content:
Team Haanpaa.
Family. Discipline. Growth.

Start Your Journey

Our Academy

Where the mat meets the heart

Team Haanpaa is more than a gym. We are a close-knit family of practitioners dedicated to the gentle art. From your very first class to your black belt journey, we walk the path together.

Family First

We are a team built on mutual respect, encouragement, and togetherness. Every member is family from day one.

Discipline

Consistency on the mat translates to consistency in life. We cultivate discipline through structure and accountability.

Growth

Every roll, every drill, every class is an opportunity to grow — technically, mentally, and as a human being.

Community

Our doors are open to everyone. We believe the gentle art has the power to bring people together and strengthen bonds.

Programs

Train at every level

Kids Program

Ages 5-15. Building confidence, coordination, and character through age-appropriate techniques and games. A safe space where kids learn respect and resilience.

Learn More

Fundamentals

Perfect for beginners. Learn the core positions, submissions, and escapes that form the foundation of Brazilian Jiu-jitsu in a welcoming, structured environment.

Learn More

Advanced & Competition

For experienced grapplers ready to sharpen their game. High-intensity drilling, positional sparring, and competition preparation with our top-level coaching staff.

Learn More

Instructors

Learn from the best

Coach Haanpaa

Head Instructor / Black Belt

Over 15 years on the mat. Dedicated to building a world-class academy rooted in tradition, respect, and continuous improvement.

Coach Virtanen

Assistant Instructor / Brown Belt

Competition veteran and passionate coach. Specializes in the kids and fundamentals programs with a gift for making complex techniques accessible.

Coach Laine

Competition Coach / Purple Belt

Active competitor with multiple podium finishes. Brings energy, modern techniques, and a strategic approach to the advanced and competition classes.

Schedule

Find your class

Ready to step on the mat?

Your first class is free. No experience needed, no commitment required. Come as you are and discover what the gentle art can do for you and your family.

Book Your Free Class

<?php

/**
 * Rewrites theme:./ URLs in block content.
 * It allows theme asset relative paths in templates e.g. theme:./assets/image.png
**/

// Rewrites theme:./ URLs of block content in the frontend.
add_filter( 'render_block', function ( $content ) {
	if ( ! $content ) {
		return $content;
	}
	$base = get_stylesheet_directory_uri();
	$content = preg_replace( '/(src|href)=(["\']?)theme:\.\//', '$1=$2' . $base . '/', $content );
	$content = preg_replace( '/url\((["\']?)theme:\.\//', 'url($1' . $base . '/', $content );
	return $content;
} );

// Enqueues script for theme:./ URL rewriting in the editor.
add_action( 'enqueue_block_editor_assets', function () {
	wp_enqueue_script( 'theme-assets-editor-rewrite', get_stylesheet_directory_uri() . '/theme-assets-editor-rewrite.js', [ 'wp-hooks', 'wp-compose', 'wp-element' ], '1.0.0', true );
	wp_add_inline_script( 'theme-assets-editor-rewrite', 'window.THEME_ASSETS_BASE_URL=' . wp_json_encode( get_stylesheet_directory_uri() ) . ';', 'before' );
} );

<?php

/**
 * Theme styles and editor styles setup.
 * It enqueues the main stylesheet in the front-end and in the editor.
**/

add_action( 'after_setup_theme', function () {
	add_theme_support( 'editor-styles' );
	add_editor_style( 'style.css' );
} );

add_action( 'wp_enqueue_scripts', function () {
	wp_enqueue_style( 'telex-theme-style', get_stylesheet_uri(), [], wp_get_theme()->get( 'Version' ) );
} );
